offer: For medical clinic administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate billing instead of manual billing processes and spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient management of patient invoicing and insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinic administrators
